# Sovandarapor (James) Kong — Notes from the Road

> Essays and notes on nondual awareness, travel, and building businesses across Cambodia, Thailand, Vietnam, and France by Sovandarapor (James) Kong.

This site is a personal journal: a quiet corner for nondual writing, travel notes from Southeast Asia, and a build log of ventures in agriculture, dairy, spirits, media, and hospitality — most rooted in Cambodia.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Featured essays and a typographic index of all writing.
- [About / Profile](/about): Sovandarapor (James) Kong — ventures, craft, and contact.
- [Nondual](/nondual): A quiet corner on nondual awareness.
- [Blog](/blog): The full journal — essays, notes, travel, build log.
- [Cambodia](/cambodia): Notes on living, building, and writing from Cambodia.
- [Thailand](/thailand): Notes from Thailand.
- [Vietnam](/vietnam): Notes from Vietnam.
- [France](/france): Notes from France.
- [Brand Building](/brand-building): On building brands out of Cambodia for global markets.
- [Contact](/contact): Email and LinkedIn.

## Optional

- [Sitemap](/sitemap.xml): Full machine-readable index of pages.
